analysis.summary_en: Explosive risk-on session in Taipei with TAIEX +3.23% led by semiconductors. MediaTek limit-up (+9.93%), TSMC +5.05%, ASE +6.78%. But ADRs traded DOWN overnight on the same names — a massive 6-7% divergence that screams the local rally is either catching up to prior strength OR is ahead of a gap-down on the next NY session. Given ADRs fell, the arrow likely points to local profit-taking risk tomorrow. Hon Hai (2317) notably lagged/fell, suggesting rotation from Apple-chain assembly into AI logic/memory names. SK Hynix-TSMC HBM4 collaboration and TI strong results underpin the AI semi narrative.
analysis.summary_zh: 台股今日強勢風險偏好,加權指數+3.23%,半導體領軍。聯發科漲停(+9.93%)、台積電+5.05%、日月光投控+6.78%。但同名ADR昨夜下跌,產生6-7%的巨大背離——本地漲勢可能是補漲,也可能領先於下一個紐約交易時段的跳空下跌。鑑於ADR下跌,明日本地獲利了結風險升高。鴻海(2317)明顯落後並下跌,顯示資金從蘋果組裝鏈輪動至AI邏輯/記憶體。SK海力士與台積電HBM4合作及TI財報佳音支撐AI半導體敘事。

key_stories.headline_en: SK Hynix deepens TSMC ties with HBM4 at TSMC North America Symposium
key_stories.headline_zh: SK海力士於台積電北美技術論壇深化HBM4合作,推進記憶體-邏輯整合
key_stories.analysis_en: HBM4 co-integration with TSMC foundry reinforces TSMC's advanced-packaging (CoWoS) moat and by extension MediaTek's access to cutting-edge AI ASIC nodes. This supports today's TSMC +5% and MediaTek limit-up move, though the magnitude of MediaTek's +9.93% seems to price in a specific customer win beyond just this symposium news — watch for an ASIC announcement.
key_stories.analysis_zh: HBM4與台積電代工整合強化台積電先進封裝(CoWoS)護城河,並延伸至聯發科取得尖端AI ASIC製程的能力。這支持今日台積電+5%及聯發科漲停走勢,但聯發科+9.93%的幅度似乎反映了超越論壇新聞的特定客戶勝出——留意ASIC相關公告。

key_stories.headline_en: Texas Instruments signals further price hikes on strong data center & industrial demand
key_stories.headline_zh: 德州儀器因資料中心與工業需求強勁,考慮進一步調漲價格
key_stories.analysis_en: TI's pricing power confirmation + industrial rebound is a broad positive for analog/MCU names and sentiment. Pairs with Artery MCU news of potential price hikes. UMC (2303) up only 1.22% vs ADR -5.59% is concerning — ADR selloff suggests US investors see foundry overcapacity risk that local buyers ignored.
key_stories.analysis_zh: TI確認定價能力及工業復甦,對類比/MCU族群與整體情緒有利,與雅特力考慮調漲價格相呼應。聯電(2303)僅漲1.22%但ADR跌5.59%值得警惕——ADR賣壓顯示美國投資人看到成熟製程代工產能過剩風險,本地買方忽略。

key_stories.headline_en: Hon Hai lags broad rally, down 1.56% while index surges
key_stories.headline_zh: 鴻海逆勢下跌1.56%,落後大盤強漲
key_stories.analysis_en: Hon Hai's underperformance in a +3% tape is a tell. With TAIEX +3.23% and peers limit-up, 2317 red on 76M shares volume suggests either Apple/iPhone channel concern or AI server order timing worry (Nvidia GB200/300 rack shipment delays rumor resurfacing). Worth watching — if TSMC/MediaTek hold gains next session and Hon Hai stays weak, it's stock-specific not macro.
key_stories.analysis_zh: 鴻海在大盤+3%的背景下表現落後是個警訊。加權+3.23%、同業漲停,2317在7600萬股成交量下收黑,暗示蘋果/iPhone通路疑慮或AI伺服器訂單出貨時點擔憂(GB200/300機櫃延遲傳聞再現)。值得觀察——若台積電/聯發科次日守住漲幅而鴻海續弱,即屬個股因素而非總經。

key_stories.headline_en: White House accuses China of industrial-scale AI IP theft
key_stories.headline_zh: 白宮指控中國進行『工業規模』AI智財竊取,暗示加強管制
key_stories.analysis_en: Geopolitical escalation risk. A US crackdown could mean new export controls affecting Taiwan foundries' China-based customers. Local market appears to be ignoring this today, but if it translates to new BIS rules over coming weeks, advanced-node TSMC wins but mature-node UMC/SMIC-adjacent plays lose. This may partly explain ADR-local divergence in 2303.
key_stories.analysis_zh: 地緣政治升級風險。美方收緊可能意味新出口管制影響台灣晶圓廠的中國客戶。本地市場今日似乎忽略此訊息,但若未來數週轉化為新的BIS規則,先進製程台積電受惠,而成熟製程聯電/中芯相關股承壓。這可能部分解釋聯電ADR-本地的背離。

adr_arbitrage.interpretation_en: Massive 6.28% gap with ADR down and local up sharply. This is the largest single-day divergence worth flagging. Likely the local rally is catching up to recent ADR strength from prior sessions, OR Taipei is front-running positive news the NY session will reprice up tonight. If NY doesn't rally on TSM tonight, expect local gap-down tomorrow of 2-3%. FALSIFIER: TSM closing green tonight would confirm local was right.
adr_arbitrage.interpretation_zh: ADR下跌而本地大漲,產生6.28%的巨大缺口,是今日最值得標記的單日背離。可能情境:本地補漲對映ADR先前強勢,或台北領先反映利多而紐約今晚將補漲。若今晚TSM未上漲,預期明日本地跳空下跌2-3%。反證條件:TSM今晚收紅即確認本地方向正確。

adr_arbitrage.interpretation_en: Largest divergence in the pack. ADR -5.59% is a significant selloff that local +1.22% is ignoring. UMC guidance or mature-node foundry pricing concern is the likely culprit. High risk of local catch-down. FALSIFIER: UMC ADR recovering tonight, or a specific mature-node price hike announcement.
adr_arbitrage.interpretation_zh: 族群中最大背離。ADR跌5.59%是顯著賣壓,本地+1.22%完全忽略。可能成因為聯電財測或成熟製程代工價格疑慮。本地補跌風險高。反證條件:聯電ADR今晚反彈,或出現成熟製程明確漲價公告。

adr_arbitrage.interpretation_en: Largest absolute gap. ASE local +6.78% while ADR essentially flat/down. Advanced packaging CoWoS-S/L theme is the local narrative (SK Hynix-TSMC news). ADR holders don't seem to share the enthusiasm. Wife should be cautious chasing 3711 here — the divergence is extreme and suggests local momentum buying. FALSIFIER: ADR closing +3% or more tonight would validate the local move.
adr_arbitrage.interpretation_zh: 絕對值最大背離。日月光投控本地+6.78%而ADR幾近平盤/下跌。先進封裝CoWoS-S/L題材是本地敘事(SK海力士-台積電新聞),ADR持有人似乎不認同這種熱情。建議Michael太太謹慎追高3711——背離極端,顯示本地動能買盤。反證條件:ADR今晚收漲3%以上即驗證本地走勢。

analysis.no_signals_note: Session is highly signal-rich; not a quiet night. Primary actionable read: the 6-7% ADR-local gap across three major semis is extraordinary and historically resolves toward the ADR direction within 1-2 sessions unless overnight NY trade confirms the local bid.
